description: An account manager needs to check if a monthly campaign budget is on track to spend correctly.

nodes.task_description: Identify the total monthly budget for the campaign.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the total budget is $10,000.

nodes.task_description: Determine how many days have passed in the current month.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies that it is the 15th day of a 30-day month (50% elapsed).

nodes.task_description: Pull the month-to-date spend for the campaign.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the campaign has spent $4,000.

nodes.task_description: Compare the percentage of budget spent (40%) to the percentage of time elapsed (50%) and report that the campaign is under-pacing.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the pacing status and recommends increasing daily budgets.
